context: 2010 was the year the Gaon Chart launched as South Korea's first official national music chart. The second-generation idol wave was in full force, with girl groups dominating — half the year-end top 10 were girl group songs. miss A's debut 'Bad Girl Good Girl' topped the inaugural year-end chart. IU, then 17, scored a massive hit with 'Nagging,' foreshadowing her rise to become one of Korea's biggest solo artists.

tracks.title: Bap Jal Meokgo Danineunji (Still Eating Well)
Jugeoudo Mot Bonae (Can't Send You Even If I Die)
